title: Kneiffia riparia

intro: Kneiffia riparia, also known as Kneiffia, is a flowering plant species belonging to the family Aristolochiaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in medicine to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues, due to its anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties. The bioactive constituents of Kneiffia riparia include aristolochic acids and other alkaloids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. Herbal preparations made with Kneiffia typically include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to relieve coughs, colds, and other respiratory problems.
